use_cases: Create immersive atmospheric backgrounds for creative portfolios and landing pages
Add dynamic weather effects to music streaming or ambient sound applications
Enhance entertainment or gaming sites with realistic rain and storm simulations
Use as a visually engaging hero background for SaaS or media landing pages
ai_summary: A customizable rain particle animation component featuring dynamic raindrops with configurable intensity, speed, angle, and size parameters. Includes optional lightning flashes and thunder audio effects for creating immersive stormy weather scenes. Built with React hooks for performant continuous animation, suitable for dark-themed hero sections and atmospheric backgrounds.
